title: Commission.enabled_builtin_tools=[] hides every built-in tool
description: enabled_builtin_tools is a subtractive allow-list over the agent's tool surface (descriptor.tools). An empty list exposes none: agent_started.data.avp.tools MUST be an empty array, so the model gets no tools. The run still completes normally. Cross-agent: goose doesn't load its developer extension; claude filters the merged tool bag to the (empty) allow-list.

commission.prompt: Reply with exactly the word DONE and nothing else.
